CIPHER.460.cipherString: Nature has become something new. It is ours now, truly. And if our creation devours us, how poetic will that be?
CIPHER.460.question: The following quote by Paolo Bacigalupi needs to be decoded with the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.460.author: Paolo Bacigalupi

CIPHER.447.cipherString: Pay attention to the intricate patterns of your existence that you take for granted.
CIPHER.447.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Checkerboard puzzle by Doug Dillon with a Polybius key of SPLENDOR. What does it say?
CIPHER.447.author: Doug Dillon

CIPHER.440.cipherString: Thinking of the sun causes quick beating of my heart -- snowy weather comes on the wind lightly drifting.
CIPHER.440.question: The school's ancient overhead projector flickered and burned this Aristocrat message onto the screen—decode Anna Akhmatova using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.440.author: Anna Akhmatova

CIPHER.458.cipherString: I want to be the positive force that heals people and being humble does that.
CIPHER.458.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Porta puzzle by Andile Dlamini using a keyword of UNLIKE. What does it say?
CIPHER.458.author: Andile Dlamini

CIPHER.434.cipherString: We know that he has, more than any other man, the gift of compressing the largest number of words into the smallest amount of thought.
CIPHER.434.question: This coded passage was discovered in the margin of a math exam from years ago. It's a quote by Winston Churchill, encrypted as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with WEK. What does it say?
CIPHER.434.author: Winston Churchill

CIPHER.442.cipherString: Si tienes una debilidad especial, no la expongas tratando de hacer cosas que la saquen a la luz.
CIPHER.442.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Spurgeon in Spanish, written in a Xenocrypt using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.442.author: Spurgeon
CIPHER.442.translation: If you have a special weakness, do not expose it by attempting to do things which will bring it out.

CIPHER.443.cipherString: Education makes your maths better, not necessarily your manners.
CIPHER.443.question: Hidden in the margin of a library book on black holes: decode this Complete Columnar version of Amit Kalantri. The quote has BETTER somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.443.author: Amit Kalantri

CIPHER.446.cipherString: Of course not, she agreed, You are nothing if not exhaustive in your self-congratulatory made-up logic.
CIPHER.446.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Brandon Sanderson, encoded as an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains the word NOT twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.446.author: Brandon Sanderson

CIPHER.431.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Heraclitus, written in a Hill Cipher with a keyword of DIRT. What does it say?
CIPHER.431.author: Heraclitus

CIPHER.438.cipherString: Let's face it - the only way to truly make a lasting impact is by embracing change and standing out from the crowd.
CIPHER.438.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote by Felecia Etienne encoded using an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Key Phrase used to encode it?
CIPHER.438.author: Felecia Etienne

CIPHER.455.cipherString: Nobody can make you feel inferior without your permission.
CIPHER.455.question: A vending machine just dispensed a candy wrapper with this Nihilist Substitution code by Eleanor Roosevelt with a keyword of OPENLY and Polybius key of ALCHEMIST. What does it say?
CIPHER.455.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

CIPHER.456.cipherString: If you can dream it, you can do it. Never give up on your dreams.
CIPHER.456.question: Your lava lamp started bubbling in Baconian code by John Basedow. What does it say?
CIPHER.456.author: John Basedow

CIPHER.437.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Hill encoded quote by Erica Jong with a keyword of PROVISION. What does it say?
CIPHER.437.author: Erica Jong

CIPHER.432.cipherString: Los amigos se revelan unos a otros con la mayor claridad exactamente aquello sobre lo que callan.
CIPHER.432.question: Someone has left a coded message on the classroom 3D printer's display. You’re told it's a quote by Goethe in Spanish, written in a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.432.author: Goethe
CIPHER.432.translation: Friends reveal to each other most clearly exactly that upon which they are silent.

CIPHER.457.cipherString: Look to the day when we can say goodbye to all out heroes because their work is done. Justice is alive, independent, unassailable.
CIPHER.457.question: A laser-etched message on the inside of a geodes crystal reads: solve this Patristocrat version of Martin Firrell's wisdom using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with LOOK. What does it say?
CIPHER.457.author: Martin Firrell

CIPHER.439.question: A message encrypted with the Cryptarithm Cipher has been received. What do the values 10234 7851 983 456 decode to?

CIPHER.452.cipherString: He is best served who has no need to put other people's hands at the end of his arms.
CIPHER.452.question: You find this encoded line written in invisible ink on a lab safety poster. It's a quote by Rousseau, written in a Checkerboard. The 37th through 42nd cipher units (YS PS YK YS YI PS) decode to be PEOPLE. What does it say?
CIPHER.452.author: Rousseau

CIPHER.449.cipherString: When we pay attention, we don't spend on it. But what we achieve is worth spending an entire life on.
CIPHER.449.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Kangoma Kindembo encoded as an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.449.author: Kangoma Kindembo

CIPHER.451.question: Your drone photographed some weird markings in a parking lot. Turns out it's a quote in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 9016 657834 2078 decode to?

CIPHER.454.cipherString: We stand like a race with shrunken muscles, staring helplessly at the weights our forefathers easily lifted.
CIPHER.454.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Henry James, encoded using an Aristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Key Phrase used to encode it?
CIPHER.454.author: Henry James

CIPHER.441.cipherString: good news stops to take breath on the road ; bad news never requires it.
CIPHER.441.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote encoded as a Checkerboard with a Polybius key of DOWNSTREAM. What does it say?

CIPHER.436.cipherString: Remember that all models are wrong; the practical question is how wrong do they have to be to not be useful.
CIPHER.436.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. It's a quote by George E. P. Box, encoded in an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.436.author: George E. P. Box

CIPHER.448.cipherString: Romance is the poetry of literature.
CIPHER.448.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote by Madame Necker, written in a Baconian Cipher. You are told that the deciphered text starts with ROMA. What does it say?
CIPHER.448.author: Madame Necker

CIPHER.453.cipherString: I didn't get where I am today by worrying about how I'd feel tomorrow.
CIPHER.453.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Ron White encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of EASILY and Polybius key of NOTICEABLY. What does it say?
CIPHER.453.author: Ron White

CIPHER.435.cipherString: You didnt lose your power; you GAVE it away. It won't come back on its own; you must TAKE it back!
CIPHER.435.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Steve Maraboli encoded with a Complete Columnar. The quote has POWER somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.435.author: Steve Maraboli

CIPHER.433.cipherString: There is hope and a kind of beauty in there somewhere, if you look for it.
CIPHER.433.question: Your Bunsen burner's flame suddenly spelled this Nihilist Substitution message by H. R. Giger with a keyword length of 5. The 20th through 29th cipher units (32 56 40 57 26 33 36 39 66 55) decode to be OFBEAUTYIN. What does it say?
CIPHER.433.author: H. R. Giger

CIPHER.459.cipherString: Dad and mom would have preferred that I be a doctor, a lawyer, a scientist, or a great humanitarian.
CIPHER.459.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Levon Helm, written as an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.459.author: Levon Helm

CIPHER.450.cipherString: If only life could be a little more tender and art a little more robust.
CIPHER.450.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote by Alan Rickman, encrypted using a Porta. The 27th through 32nd cipher characters (KVFNEX) decode to be RETEND. What does it say?
CIPHER.450.author: Alan Rickman

CIPHER.444.cipherString: By the end of my second term we will have the first permanent base on the moon and it will be American.
CIPHER.444.question: You intercepted this transmission from a rogue weather balloon. Decode the Aristocrat version of Newt Gingrich's famous words. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE thrice. What does it say?
CIPHER.444.author: Newt Gingrich

CIPHER.445.cipherString: Diagnosis is not the end, but the beginning of practice.
CIPHER.445.question: You find a coded sequence scratched into the surface of a lab stool. It turns out to be a quote by Martin H. Fischer, written in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.445.author: Martin H. Fischer
